title: EnderChestPlus
description: EnderChestPlus is a plugin that allows you to edit delete additems and more
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e965ed305d5c0f0341d3c56a72512e9b7d9a50.png)




   












![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c1cba07f12d791779f258b6fb7566dbc54d3c1.png)


```
✅ View other player enderchest!
✅ Modify player enderchest!
✅ Customize prefix and other messages!
✅ Delete all one player enderchest!
✅ All server enderchests database
✅ Customize open, load, reload... enderchest message
```

![Perm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b0b23f3c9f6aa51211fd60bbc254b236ae1c2a.png)



```
enderchestplus.additem
enderchestplus.view
enderchestplus.deletechest
enderchestplus.use
```

![localoca](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c237196a7f2ebe27d48321969336fa61bbbc4dd.png)


```
/ecp [view,deletechest,additem,help]
/enderchestplus [view,deletechest,additem,help]
/enderchest
/ec
```

![database](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/801fc54f65da98293489a1ad9ad3069fadcbef0a.gif)
